# CVraft - AI-Powered LaTeX Resume Builder

CVraft is a modern, AI-powered resume and CV builder that enables job seekers to compile high-quality LaTeX resumes instantly. Unlike standard word processors, LaTeX-generated resumes have perfect typographical alignment and parse flawlessly through Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).

## What It Does
CVraft helps users build, preview, and download clean, professional LaTeX-based resumes. The application supports live watermarked previews and provides high-quality PDF downloads upon purchasing a payment plan.

## Key Features
- **ATS-Optimized Resumes:** Formatted specifically to pass through recruiters' Applicant Tracking Systems without parsing errors.
- **LaTeX Compile Engine:** Compiles actual LaTeX code to produce pixel-perfect, clean PDF documents.
- **AI-Powered Enhancements:** Integrated with AI services to check resume quality and generate custom cover letters.
- **Multiple Premium Templates:** Clean templates suitable for software developers, managers, designers, and students.
- **Secure Payment Options:** Integrates Razorpay Standard Web Checkout for secure one-time payments.

## Target Users
- Students and fresh graduates looking for their first job.
- Tech professionals and software engineers who prefer the clean look of LaTeX resumes.
- Experienced professionals who want an ATS-friendly resume to maximize shortlisting rates.

## Main Pages
- **Homepage:** https://www.cvraft.com
- **Pricing:** https://www.cvraft.com/pricing (Transparent one-time pricing plans: Basic, Pro, and Bundle. No subscription required.)
- **About:** https://www.cvraft.com/about
- **Contact:** https://www.cvraft.com/contact
- **Login:** https://www.cvraft.com/login
- **Register:** https://www.cvraft.com/register
- **Dashboard:** https://www.cvraft.com/dashboard (User dashboard to view and manage generated resumes)
